text:
Port is updated to 20071029 snapshot
	***Since the snapshots change almost daily at the
	primary download site, I need to make the snapshot for
	this port version available to be downloaded from
	${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}.  How do I do that?  The distfile
	at issue has size 1326691.

How-To-Repeat: 	NA
